[ 00:20 · Brand Reel ] IQS in motion — inspection, dashboards, sign-off.
What we do
Full-scope inspection services

From a single FAT to a multi-year EPC program — IQS deploys senior specialists that become an extension of your quality function.

🛡
Supplier Inspection (2nd & 3rd Party)
On-site at manufacturers’ premises. Full ITP witness & review. Mechanical, electrical, instrumentation.
📡
NDT & Dimensional Control
UT, RT, PT, MT. Inline production, in-yard, stockpiled. Valves, flanges, forgings, coatings.
🔩
Line Pipe Specialist
Thousands of km of CS, Duplex and CRA Clad linepipe inspected — mill production through installation.
⏱
Expediting
Proactive procurement monitoring. Identifies supply chain risks before they impact project schedule.
🚢
FPSO & Offshore Platforms
Construction & commissioning surveillance of FPSOs, drillships, lay barges — fabrication to start-up.
🌐
Outsourcing & Staff Augmentation
Rapid deployment of qualified inspectors and engineers for project-specific or long-term needs worldwide.
How we work
From ITP to final release

A structured 5-step deployment model with named accountability at every stage — from first document review to IRN issuance.

01
ITP Review
PO, standards, hold & witness points defined upfront
02
Team Deployment
Plant Lead on-site, single client contact point
03
Surveillance
Welding, HT, NDT, dimensional, hydro, FI — continuous presence
04
NCR Management
Raised, tracked and closed in real time
05
MDR & Release
IRN issuance, full documentation sign-off
Digital ecosystem
Interactive dashboards & live reports

Beyond traditional reporting — browser-based, mobile-ready tools that give the client real-time visibility into every order, every day. Each project receives its own dedicated dashboard, set up within 48h of kick-off.

QC Dashboard
Halios Gas Field
Full production & inspection tracking. Real-time KPIs, defect log, phase semaphores, Day/Night shift split.
User view Admin Excel PDF JSON
Password protected

Online archive of all weekly Flash Reports for Order 77821. Full production history, NCR log, KPI trends — browsable & downloadable.

Reporting ecosystem
Structured transparency — daily & weekly

Automated, consistent, management-ready. Generated from daily production data and delivered every Monday morning in Word and Excel format.

[ 00:13 · Pre-shipment & loading ] Yard → quay → vessel → bill of lading — witnessed end-to-end.
Daily — live dashboard
Production count
Inspected / released / rejected per phase — updated continuously by inspectors in the field.
NCR & punch status
Open non-conformances and punch items: raised, pending, closed. Real-time client visibility.
Activity log (Day / Night)
Witness & hold points attended, observations raised, deviations logged per shift.
Critical flags
Production stops, repairs, quality deviations escalated same day — zero delay.
Weekly — Flash Report
Executive summary
KPI snapshot, % completion per phase, main events — designed for management-level review.
Production KPI table
PO qty, inspected, released, delta vs target. Green / Amber / Red semaphore per phase.
Forecast & critical path
Projected completion dates per phase. Bottleneck identification and recommended actions.
Next week plan
Upcoming milestones, witness / hold points, inspectors on-site, planned outages.
On demand — Technical Inspection
Pipe Storage & Handling audit
Yard inspection of stacking, end caps, segregation by heat/grade, dunnage, drainage and marking integrity — with photo evidence and recommended actions.
Pre-shipment & loading survey
Lashing, bracing, packing list reconciliation and damage check before despatch from mill or yard.
Coating & preservation check
Visual / DFT verification, weather exposure assessment, condition reports for long-term stockpile.
Issued as signed PDF
Numbered TIR document, photo annex, inspector sign-off — usable as third-party record for client & insurer.
Reference projects
Proven in the field

Large-scale, high-complexity programs where IQS delivered full inspection management — from production kick-off to final release.

Order 77821  ·  Active
APP Phase B
CRA Clad (MRB) MWPL Line Pipes · Apex Marine / Hokuto Steel GmbH
Manufacturer: Bremen Special Pipe GmbH, Hannover, Germany
4,461Total pipes
8Phases
24/7Coverage
IQS inspection scope
Material incoming inspection & heat traceability
Welding surveillance — CS + Clad layers, WPS/PQR, welder qualification
PWHT witness & chart review · UT, RT, PT multi-technique NDT
Hydrostatic testing, dimensional control & coating inspection
Final Inspection, NCR management, IRN issuance, MDR review

Why IQS
What sets us apart

Not a generalist TPI firm. A specialist partner with named accountability, genuine technical depth and a fully integrated digital reporting infrastructure.

🔩
Deep CRA & linepipe specialization
Genuine depth in CRA Clad, Duplex and CS linepipe — weld traceability, mechanical testing, heat correlation. Proven across 4,000+ pipe programs.
👤
Named on-site leadership
Every project has a named Plant Lead. No rotating inspectors. The client always knows who is accountable — day and night.
📊
Integrated digital reporting ecosystem
Live dashboards, automated Flash Reports and production tracking. Real-time visibility — not week-old PDFs.
🌎
Scalable worldwide deployment
From a single FAT to a 3-year multi-phase program. Direct staff + vetted global freelance network — wherever and whenever needed.
Let’s work together

From the first weld to the final release — IQS is with you.

Request a proposal → iqs-ww.com
